calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Previous Court Order, For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record, And For Evidentiary And Issue Sanctions
Off Calendar May-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF ASHLEY RHODES' Motion To Compel Compliance With Previous Court Order, For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record, And For Evidentiary And Issue Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Emily Miller, Esq., of Case Harvey Fedor, (619) 338-0300, for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is granted as to defendant's failure to produce code-compliant responses and documents responsive to such code-compliant responses, as well as monetary sanctions. It is denied without prejudice to renewal in the event of further failures by defendant as to plaintiff's request for non-monetary sanctions. Defendant shall produce fully code-compliant responses and responsive documents within 20 days of the date of order. Defendant and its counsel shall pay sanctions to plaintiff for abuse of the discovery process and failure to obey the previous order of this Court in the amount of $3,810.00 within 20 days of the date of order. Counsel for the prevailing party shall submit a proposed order in Word format to the Temporary Judge at jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Set For Trial On Jul-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery, To Compel Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court announces he did not receive any objections to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ASHLEY RHODES's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery, To Compel Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant And Its Counsel Of Record.

PLAINTIFF ASHLEY RHODES' (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "RHODES") MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT WMGUARD INSURANCE COMPANY (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "AMGUARD") TO FURTHER RESPOND TO DISCOVERY, PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AND IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINT DEFENDANT AND ITS COUNSEL IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF A FURTHER VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSE TO FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 1.1 AND A VERIFICATION TO ALL OTHER PREVIOUS RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FORM INTERROGATORIES.
(2) WITHIN TWENTY (20) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES RESPONSES TO ALL REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION AND ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS REQUESTED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NO 1, 2, 4 & 5.
(3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST ANY PARTY TO THIS LITIGATION
COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON NOVERMBER 14, 2023.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
